===={{aniseries|XY}}====
[[File:Giovanni XY anime.png|thumb|left|250px|Giovanni in ''[[Pokémon the Series: XY]]'']]
In ''Pokémon the Series: XY'', Giovanni's role was reduced to the Team Rocket trio's benefactor during their assignments in the [[Kalos]] region. He appeared in ''[[XY003|A Battle of Aerial Mobility!]]'', where he told the trio to work hard in Kalos. In ''[[XY029|Heroes — Friend and Faux Alike!]]'', Jessie and James reported their progress in capturing Pokémon with their obtaining of {{TP|James|Inkay}} and {{TP|Jessie|Pumpkaboo}}. Pleased with their report, Giovanni told them to keep up their work.

In ''[[XY107|An Explosive Operation!]]'', the trio contacted Giovanni to tell him of their latest activity. They told him of [[Team Flare|an organization wearing orange suits]], which he was already familiar with, and of the existence of [[Squishy]]. He became alarmed after learning said organization could hinder Team Rocket, and ordered the trio to investigate them. Later, after fighting with Team Flare, the trio contacted him again to tell him that another Zygarde Core transformed into {{DL|List of Pokémon with form differences|Zygarde|a much more powerful form}}. Intrigued by this, Giovanni assigned them a mission to claim Zygarde's power for Team Rocket.

In ''[[XY137|Battling with a Clean Slate!]]'', Giovanni received information on Team Flare's demise, and was visibly pleased upon being told by the trio that it was all thanks to their actions. He asked them to prepare a detailed report on the matter.

In ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]'', the trio sent him a video of their role in the Team Flare incident, in which they made it appear as if they had a larger role. He congratulated them on their success in Kalos, and ordered them to return to {{an|Team Rocket HQ}}.
